messages.content:
翻译一下：The display of a large load of vectorial data in "real time" has
always been a challenge for software developers. As part of
the development of CAD tools to manage a wafer-scale
integrated circuit, the volume of data to handle is substantial.
This article focuses on the development of a simple and
effective display technique to manage software representation
of Wafer Scale Integrated circuits using equipment available
in common computers (Desktop multimedia PC).
Experimental results show a performance improvement by a
factor of 254 compared to software vectorial rendering with
an “ATI radeon 5570” video card. This paper shows that the
proposed display technique normally used for graphic
intensive 3D displays (video games, 3D cad tools) can also
benefit other 2D applications.

在“实时”显示大量的矢量数据方面，一直是软件开发人员面临的挑战。作为开发CAD工具以管理芯片级集成电路的一部分，需要处理的数据量较大。本文重点介绍了一种简单有效的显示技术，使用通用计算机（桌面多媒体PC）上可用的设备来管理芯片级集成电路的软件表示。实验结果表明，与使用“ATI radeon 5570”视频卡进行软件矢量渲染相比，性能提高了254倍。本文表明，通常用于图形密集的3D显示（视频游戏、3D CAD工具）的提议显示技术也可以使其他2D应用程序受益。

翻译：A rapid prototyping platform for electronic systems has
recently been proposed [1]. The core of this platform is a
Wafer Scale Integrated (WSI) circuit called WaferIC™. This
technology allows a user to simply deposit his integrated
circuits randomly on the platform to prototype his electronic
system [2]. To ensure connectivity to the components placed
on the WaferIC™, its surface is covered by a large number of
metallic contacts called NanoPads. A user CAD tool called
WaferConnect™ allows users to interact with the hardware
through a graphical user interface (GUI). Effective algorithms
in the design flow, such as pin detection, package
recognition, diagnosis and routing, provide users with a large
quantity of information relating to the state of the prototyped
system. The fact that the platform is based on a WSI circuit
implies the possible presence of defects in this circuit. These
defects are managed by inclusion of redundant hardware, as
well as a software defect detection algorithm.

最近提出了一个用于电子系统快速原型的平台[1]。这个平台的核心是一个称为WaferIC™的芯片级集成电路。 这项技术允许用户将集成电路随意放置在平台上进行电子系统的原型设计[2]。为确保与放置在WaferIC™上的组件的连通性，其表面被覆盖了大量的金属接触点，称为NanoPad。一个名为WaferConnect™的用户CAD工具可以通过图形用户界面（GUI）与硬件进行交互。设计流程中的有效算法，如引脚检测、封装识别、诊断和路由，为用户提供了大量有关原型系统状态的信息。这个平台基于芯片级集成电路，意味着这个电路可能存在缺陷。这些缺陷通过包括冗余硬件以及软件缺陷检测算法来进行管理。

翻译一下：The functional display of the wafer dataset must manage
many objects and must be accurate enough for the user to
spot defects and read the status information pertaining to each
object. The display process is one that can be called many
times per second. This number depends either on the imposed
frequency or the user’s actions. A long display time is obviously quite undesirable as it increases user design time
and decreases productivity. For such reasons, the aim of the
WaferConnect is to obtain a minimum of 10 frames per
second, which is a convenient speed for an interactive display
in a CAD tool. To meet that goal two alternatives have been
proposed. Some authors report the use of images made at the
startup of the software (raster graphics [3]) and others use
application specific hardware for accelerating vector
rendering via OpenGL [4], which allows staying independent
of the operating system. Notice that the OpenGL technology
is best suited to represent some specific types of data, namely
polygons and lines, as the technology is usually expected to
produce a fast 3D representation of polygon-based models.
Other display techniques exist [3-5], but they are generally
application specific combinations of those mentioned before.
For example, texture mapping algorithms involves the use of
a raster graphics image to fill a polygon. Such algorithms are
longer to implement and less adaptable. The current Graphics
Processing Units (GPU) available in computer’s graphic
cards all support the basic instructions to calculate and draw
polygons using the OpenGL API. This paper proposes an
optimized exploitation of the GPU to simplify and accelerate
the display, even in a 2D scene with user interaction.

芯片数据集的功能显示必须管理许多对象，并且必须足够准确，以便用户能够发现缺陷并读取与每个对象相关的状态信息。显示过程可以被称为每秒执行多次。这个数字取决于施加的频率或用户的操作。长时间的显示时间显然是不可取的，因为它增加了用户的设计时间并降低了生产力。为此，WaferConnect的目标是获得至少10帧每秒的速度，这是CAD工具中交互式显示的方便速度。为了实现这个目标，提出了两个替代方案。一些作者报告了使用在软件启动时制作的图像（光栅图形[3]），而其他人则使用应用程序特定的硬件通过OpenGL来加速矢量渲染[4]，这允许保持独立于操作系统。请注意，OpenGL技术最适合表示某些特定类型的数据，即多边形和线段，因为通常期望这项技术能够快速生成基于多边形模型的3D表示。还存在其他显示技术[3-5]，但它们通常是前面提到的应用程序特定组合。例如，纹理映射算法涉及使用光栅图形图像来填充多边形。这些算法实现起来更加复杂，适应性也更差。计算机图形卡中的当前图形处理单元（GPU）都支持使用OpenGL API计算和绘制多边形的基本指令。本文提出了一种优化GPU的利用方法，简化和加速显示，即使在具有用户交互的2D场景中。

The paper is organized as follows: the next section presents
the WaferIC architecture and technologies available to
display its components. Then section 3 discusses the real time
interaction necessary between the display technology and our
software environment, especially with respect to the selection
problems. Section 4 presents results obtained and section 5
concludes by summarizing our contributions. 翻译一下
本文的组织结构如下：下一部分介绍WaferIC架构以及可用于显示其组件的技术。然后第3节讨论显示技术与我们的软件环境之间必要的实时交互，特别是与选择问题相关的交互。第4节介绍了所获得的结果，第5节总结了我们的贡献。

A brief review of the prototyping platform for electronic
systems is presented to show the nature and amount of data to
display. The platform is implemented using a Wafer Scale
Integrated (WSI) circuit at its core and it is organized
hierarchically (Fig. 1): The surface of this WSI circuit is
composed of 76 reticule images, each containing 1024 cells.
Each cell is covered by 16 NanoPads and is connected to the
neighboring cells using 24 links to propagate data and to
electrically connect the NanoPads, and of 8 links to pass
configuration information. This amounts to 1,323,084  elements and 1,245,184 links for a total of 2,568,268 objects.
The display of reticule images and cells allows the user to
know which platform location he is viewing. The NanoPads
should be displayed in case of malfunction or in case of
contacts with a pin to allow the user to visualize the position
of components and of their pins detected on the surface of the
platform. Users may also need to visualize the individual
links in case of malfunction or usage to make visual
verification of configuration and routing paths possible. This
ability to visualize will also be invaluable to the team
developing support CAD tools for configuring the platform 翻译一下

为了展示需要显示的数据的性质和数量，简要回顾了用于电子系统原型的平台。该平台的核心采用芯片级集成电路（WSI）实现，采用分层结构（图1）：该WSI电路的表面由76个网格图像组成，每个图像包含1024个单元。每个单元上覆盖有16个纳米垫，并使用24个连接器连接相邻单元以传递数据并电连接纳米垫，另有8个连接器用于传递配置信息。总共有1323084个元素和1245184个连接器，共计2568268个对象。显示网格图像和单元可以使用户了解其正在查看的平台位置。如果发生故障或与引脚接触时，应该显示纳米垫，以便用户可视化组件的位置和其引脚在平台表面上的位置。如果发生故障或使用时，用户也可能需要可视化单个连接器以使配置和路由路径的可视验证成为可能。这种可视化的能力对于为配置平台开发支持CAD工具的团队也将非常有价值。

翻译一下：The functional display of the wafer dataset must be able to
manage 2.5 million objects and also provide the user with
precise information about the state of the electronic system
being prototyped. This display problem is not unique; it is
also present with Very Large Scale Integrated (VLSI) chips
[5]. The first approach to creating an accurate visual
representation of the hardware datasets was to exploit a
standard software rendering technique using the QT-based
API [6] (C++ GUI Framework). Elements are modeled as
objects to be displayed. They are referenced by an event
management system [6] and the scene clipping [4] is
automatically done by the QT Framework
芯片数据集的功能显示必须能够管理250万个对象，并向用户提供有关正在原型设计的电子系统状态的精确信息。这个显示问题并不是独特的；它在非常大规模集成（VLSI）芯片中也存在[5]。创建硬件数据集的准确可视化表示的第一种方法是利用使用基于QT API的标准软件渲染技术[6]（C++ GUI框架）。元素被建模为要显示的对象。它们由事件管理系统[6]引用，并且场景裁剪[4]由QT框架自动完成。

These
mechanisms allow a relatively fast display in the presence of
few objects. The display is accurate: no aliasing or pixilation,
and controls of objects such as selection and modification are
managed by the framework. However, we experimented that
beyond 10,000 objects, the computation time of the image
can become very long (as shown in section IV) and the
processor is heavily used. This solution is not viable if the
number of objects becomes of the order of millions. The
display must consume a minimum of CPU and RAM
resources so that the other parts of the application like routing
or pin detection, which have CPU consuming algorithms, can
work faster.  翻译一下

这些机制允许在存在少量对象的情况下相对快速地显示。显示是准确的：没有混叠或像素化，并且对象的控制，如选择和修改，由框架管理。但是，我们的实验表明，超过10,000个对象时，图像的计算时间可能变得非常长（如第IV节所示），处理器的使用率很高。如果对象数量达到百万级别，这种解决方案是不可行的。显示必须消耗最少的CPU和RAM资源，以便应用程序的其他部分，如路由或引脚检测，其具有高CPU消耗算法，可以更快地工作。

翻译一下：A raster graphic image stores its data as a matrix of dots
(pixels). Each dot is represented with luminance and
chrominance information. This technique is typically used for
digital displays with a frame buffer [3], like photo display or
internet maps. The downside of creating a “reference” raster
image is that it can be a slow process. Once the raster image
is generated from its vector representation, however, it is
quick and simple to display.
光栅图像将其数据以点阵（像素）矩阵的形式存储。每个点用亮度和色度信息表示。这种技术通常用于带有帧缓冲器的数字显示[3]，如照片显示或互联网地图。创建“参考”光栅图像的缺点是它可能是一个缓慢的过程。然而，一旦从其矢量表示中生成了光栅图像，它的显示过程变得快速且简单。

翻译一下：The expansion and reduction are fast
and allow representation on different scales. On the other
hand, these changes lead to a loss of precision such as
pixelation upon magnification and incorrect gaps between
objects as can be seen in Figure 2. An increase of resolution
of the reference image may be sufficient to limit these effects,
but this requires increased memory consumption
扩大和缩小是快速的，并允许在不同的比例尺上进行表示。另一方面，这些变化会导致精度损失，例如放大时可能会出现像素化，对象之间的间隙不正确，如图2所示。增加参考图像的分辨率可能足以限制这些影响，但这需要增加内存消耗。
